apsNote: Health Sciences closes 30 June. Apply early for competitive programmes.
requiredDocuments: Certified copy of South African ID or valid passport
Certified copy of matric certificate or statement of results
Proof of residence (not older than 3 months)

internationalStudents.note: International applicants require SAQA evaluation of qualifications.

applicationFee.note: CORRECTION from R200; R210 direct, CAO R250

apsSystem: APS /48 (six NSC subjects, Life Orientation excluded)

flags: MBChB APS: Medicine applicants are ranked by average percentage score rather than APS — minimum APS not published; field set to 0
BEd Intermediate Phase and Senior Phase/FET APS: subject requirements confirmed but minimum APS score not explicitly published on official page; set to 0
BPhysio APS: subject requirements confirmed from official page but minimum APS score not listed; set to 0
BAud, BSLT, BSportsSci APS: programmes confirmed on CHS page but minimum APS not found on official programme pages; set to 0

Application opening date: 'April 2026' confirmed by official-linked news source (africazine.com citing UKZN); exact day not confirmed from ukzn.ac.za directly — '1 April 2026' is widely reported but treat as approximate
SA application fee R210 confirmed for 2026 intake on applications.ukzn.ac.za; 2027 fee not yet separately published — assumed same pending official update
enrolment figure 44,628 is for 2025 academic year per official UKZN news; on-file figure of 47,000 not confirmed from official sources
